summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now ties more directly to the prior chapter's controlled-substance counting beat, and the ending now hands off toward the next chapter's breakfast frame instead of closing on another ledger mark.
edits: Recast the opening sentence to keep Carmen inside the count when the 3:07 AM call bell interrupts, strengthening entry continuity from chapter 10.
Revised the final line to pivot from the wet active-list mark to the coming breakfast-tray routine, giving the exit a cleaner handoff into chapter 12.
